title: Why IPL Auction Trends Dominate Global Searches Every Year
excerpt: Every year, the IPL auction creates a global search frenzy that dwarfs nearly every other sporting event. We break down the data showing why cricket's biggest bidding event captivates hundreds of millions of people across 60+ countries.

title: AI Agents in 2026: What the World Is Searching For
excerpt: Search interest in AI agents has surged 340% in Q1 2026. We analyze which countries are most curious, what specific questions people are asking, and what this tells us about the global AI adoption curve.

title: The K-Pop World Tour Effect: How Korean Music Moves Global Search
excerpt: When a major K-pop group announces a world tour, search trends shift across dozens of countries simultaneously. Our analysis of the data reveals the anatomy of a K-pop trend wave and how it propagates through 142 monitored countries.

title: Cherry Blossom Front: Japan's Annual Search Phenomenon Explained
excerpt: Every spring, Japan's Sakura Zensen (cherry blossom front) triggers one of the most predictable and massive search trend spikes in the world. Here's the data behind this beautiful annual phenomenon.

title: March Madness 2026: How Tournament Bracket Searches Reveal America's Obsession
excerpt: March Madness generates more bracket-related searches than any other sporting event in North America. Our analysis of search volume data reveals who's searching, when, and what the surprising patterns tell us about fan behavior.
